FRONT-END SOFTWARE ENGINEER INTERNSHIP
Medcube USA is seeking a motivated and detail-oriented Front-End Software Engineer Intern
to join our growing technology team. This internship offers an excellent opportunity to gain
hands-on experience building scalable, high-performance web applications within an
innovation-driven environment.
Key Responsibilities
* Collaborate with senior engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to design and develop
intuitive, responsive web applications.
* Build, enhance, and optimize Al-enabled web-based platforms using modern front-end frameworks.
* Implement clean, maintainable, and scalable code following industry best practices.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve front-end performance and usability issues.
* Contribute to UI/UX improvements with a strong focus on user-centered design.
* Participate in code reviews and agile development processes.
* Continuously explore emerging technologies and recommend improvements to the front-end
architecture.
Education
* Currently pursuing or recently completed a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software
Engineering, Computer Programming, or a related discipline (or equivalent practical experience).
Technical Competencies
* Hands-on experience with Angular (v2+).
* Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+).
* Experience with Taitwind CSS and Bootstrap.
* Solid understanding of UI/UX principles and responsive design.
* Familiarity with RESTful APIs and front-end integration.
* Working knowledge of Git and GitHub for version control.
Preferred (Nice to Have)
* Exposure to Nextjs and Node,js.
* Understanding of modern front-end build tools and deployment ys
workflows. s
* Basic knowledge of performance optimization techniques.

Intern to join our engineering team. This role is ideal for candidates who are passionate about

back-end services and APIs.
* Contribute to the development and integration of Al-powered features within web-based applications.
* Implement clean, maintainable, and efficient server-side logic using modern development standards.
* Optimize application performance, scalability, and database efficiency.
* Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve backend issues to ensure system reliability and stability.
* Participate in code reviews and adopt industry best practices in software architecture, version control,
and secure coding.
* Support deployment, testing, and continuous improvement of backend systems.
Education

architecture

and Angular ZO

Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49th year of business operations. While partnering the world's leading IT Co’s, DMS specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets
DMS is an equal opportunity employer that provides the excitement of working with the world's leading IT brands, Financial solutions and learning from experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents the World's leading American IT Co's IBM, HP, Oracle, Microsoft, Diebold Nixdorf, Entrust - Datacard, Cisco and VMWare and has been the first to implement many cutting-edge technology solutions in Sri Lanka for over 48 years.
The following vacancies currently exist in the Banking and Financial Systems Strategic Business Unit (SBU) of DMS.
Vacancy: Engineers for Entrust Systems (Males)
Applicants should be under 26 years of age and have a degree in Electronics / Mechatronics Engineering.
Selected candidates will be Maintaining Entrust Card Personalization Solutions installed at Banks and Commercial establishments.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior Customer Engineers, Team Leaders and Group Managers.
Candidates living in the Greater Colombo area are preferred.
Benefits:
Attractive remuneration packages based on qualifications and experience.
Comprehensive medical insurance upon confirmation.
How to Apply:
Email your CV along with the names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Please specify the position you are applying for in the subject line of the email.

Software Engineer (Male)

Working knowledge in C#, .NET Framework, Web Forms, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3 and PostgreSQL.
A willingness to learn new things, and have the ability to Understand Programming Logic.
Strong ability to reverse engineer code and the ability to read and understand code written by others.

Job Profile Includes the following: -

position: Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas (Male)
full_text:
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd
Data Management Systems (Pvt) Ltd, (DMS) is a pioneering IT Company in Sri Lanka, now in its 49
th
year of operations. DMS represents the world’s leading IT brands and specializes in Systems Integration and Customized Software Solutions for Sri Lankan and overseas markets.
DMS provides the excitement of working with the world’s leading IT brands, financial solutions and learning from the most experienced managers and professionals in the IT industry.
DMS represents Diebold Nixdorf Inc. USA, the world leader in CRMs (Cash Recycling Machines) and ATMs (Automated Teller Machines) and while having implemented the following pioneering Projects, DMS is the market leader supporting an installed base of over 2000 CRMs and ATMs in Sri Lanka and the Maldives.
Introduced ATMs to the Maldives in 1999
First CRMs in Sri Lanka and in the Maldives
First Branch and Networked Bulk Cash Depositors in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Cash Acceptance ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Envelope-less Bulk Cheque Deposit ATMs in Asia Pacific.
First Networked Foreign Currency Conversion ATMs which accept foreign currency and dispense Sri Lanka Currency and Coins.
The following vacancies now exist for candidates living in and around Matara and Tangalle areas to provide field service and support for ATMs and Cash Recyclers in this area.
Engineering Service Executives for Matara and Tangalle areas (Male)
Career opportunities exist for disciplined, motivated, self-reliant persons in Field Engineering Services who possess a positive attitude and can work under minimum supervision after initial training.
Candidates should: -
Be under 27 years of age.
Have as a minimum a National Diploma in Engineering Sciences (NDES) or HNDE or NDT or similar qualification in Electronics Engineering or Mechatronics Engineering from a recognized institution.
Have knowledge of PC hardware and Windows software.
Selected candidates will be required to service and maintain ATMs & Cash Recyclers installed at various banks in the Matara and Tangalle areas.
Candidates should reside in the Matara or Tangalle Town or in close proximity and have a motorcycle or scooter together with the relevant riding license.
Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a career path with promotional prospects to Senior ATM Service Engineers, Team Leaders, Group Managers, Department Managers and beyond.
GENERAL
• The above position includes a negotiable salary.
Please E-mail your CV stating names and addresses of two referees to
careers@dmslanka2.com
. Indicate the post applied for as the Subject of your E-mail.

s (Male)

Successful candidates who perform to the Company's expectations have a defined career growth path to Management.

Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer
Experience Required: 10+ Years
About the Opportunity
We are seeking an experienced Senior Full-Stack Software Engineer to join our team and help
shape a large-scale, enterprise-grade data management platform.
This role goes beyond feature development. You will work across a sophisticated ecosystem
that includes multiple client applications, a Node.js backend, integrations with C++ engine
components, cloud storage providers, and analytical databases.
As a senior member of the engineering team, you will contribute to architecture decisions, drive
technical excellence, and mentor other engineers while delivering high-impact solutions.
Key Responsibilities
e Own features end-to-end — Design, architect, and implement solutions from
React-based frontends to Node.js/Express backend services, ensuring scalability and
long-term maintainability
¢ Design and optimize data pipelines — Work with MySQL, PostgreSQL, and analytical
engines such as DuckDB to build high-performance data workflows
¢ Drive architectural decisions — Contribute to the evolution of a multi-tenant SaaS
platform supporting cloud, on-premise, and agent-based deployments
Develop core APIs and communication layers — Build and maintain REST APIs and
TCP/socket-based services
e Integrate cloud services — Work with AWS (S3) and Azure (Blob Storage, Identity) and
other third-party integrations
e@ Champion engineering excellence — Conduct code reviews, establish best practices,
and mentor mid-level and junior engineers
e Enhance developer experience — Improve CI/CD pipelines, build tooling, and internal
engineering workflows
Required Skills & Experience
10+ years of professional software engineering experience with demonstrated ownership
of complex production systems
Strong expertise in TypeScript and JavaScript (frontend and backend)
Deep experience with React (v17/v18), including modern state management patterns
(Redux or similar)
Proven experience with Node.js and Express in scalable production environments
e Solid knowledge of SQL and relational databases (MySQL and/or PostgreSQL),
including schema design and query optimization
e Experience integrating AWS S3 and/or Azure Blob Storage
e Strong testing background (Jest, React Testing Library, or similar)
Comfortable working in large codebases/monorepos with modern build tools
e Advanced Git workflow knowledge
e Demonstrated technical leadership and mentorship experience
Preferred Experience
© Material UI (v4/v5)
e Redis for caching and session management
e DuckDB or similar OLAP/analytical databases
e Docker and containerization
© Authentication systems (JWT, OAuth, SSO)
e@ Observability tools (Prometheus, structured logging, distributed tracing)
 Monorepo tooling such as pnpm workspaces and modern bundlers (Webpack, RSBuild)
Nice to Have
e Python for scripting, data processing, or ML/Al workflows
e Experience working alongside C/C++ native components
Storybook for component-driven development
e  Internationalization experience (i18next)
Why Join Us?
Work ona complex, high-impact enterprise platform
e Influence the architecture and engineering direction
e Collaborate with a skilled and experienced technical team
Opportunity to mentor and grow as a technical leader
Responses should be sent to Romesh.vidanage@xinfinit.com

SriLankan Airlines
Metrologist
Vacancy Description
SriLankan Airlines Ltd, the national carrier of Sri Lanka operates with a network of destinations throughout Asia, the Middle East, Europe and Australia. The airlines has a strong presence in Maldives and Southern India. SriLankan is a member of the oneworld alliance.
The incumbent is responsible to execute assigned operational functions of the calibration laboratory of SriLankan Engineering by fulfilling the regulatory and organizational requirements and executing its functions in an efficient and timely manner to the satisfaction of its internal/external customers and to take over the assigned responsibilities in the absence of Senior Metrologist.
Job Accountabilities
To implement, design calibration systems, procedures, and methods according to Calibration Laboratory Manager’s requirements to extend laboratory’s scope of accreditation
To implement, review and validate software used in calibration laboratory processes to ensure minimum turnaround time and improved accuracy of calibration results
To execute internal and external quality assurance plans to meet regulatory and organizational requirements
Conduct technical and quality audits of the laboratory to verify the traceability of measurement results and compliance with published standards and guidelines to ensure that the laboratory processes are in line with the regulatory and organizational requirements
Maintain existing calibration systems and procedures based on the principles of measurement science, technical analysis of measurement problems and precision requirements.
Periodic review of documents and records required for efficient execution of laboratory functions.
Requirements
Bachelor of Engineering (1) in Aircraft/Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Electrical and/or Electronic) or Bachelor of Science in Physical/Applied Sciences with two years of relevant post qualifying experience.
OR
Full professional qualification equivalent to NVQ level 7(2)  in the field of aircraft/Aerospace/Mechanical/Mechatronics/ Electrical and/or Electronic), with three years of relevant post-qualifying experience.
Note:
1. Qualification shall be awarded through an educational institute recognized by the University Grants Commission of Sri Lanka.
2. Qualification shall be awarded through an educational institute recognized by the Tertiary and Vocational Education Commission of Sri Lanka.
Age to be not more than
50 years
as at
07th March 2026
which is the closing date.
Be a SriLankan Citizen.
Employment will be offered on fixed term contract.
Influencing will be a reflection of unsuitability.
We are an equal opportunity Organization.
Please note that we will correspond with you within a month of closing the advertisement in the event your application is shortlisted for consideration.
Category - Airline - Aviation
Start date - 02/25/2026
End date - 03/07/2026

Titan FX is a global online trading and technology company delivering fast, reliable, and
high-performance systems across international markets. We combine cutting-edge
infrastructure with a strong engineering culture to build scalable platforms that support
high-volume financial operations.
Our team is friendly, collaborative, and multicultural - made up of talented professionals from
around the world.
We are looking for a Mid-Level PHP / Laravel Software Engineer (100% Remote) to join
our team and help build and scale high-performance backend systems used globally. If you
are a PHP Backend Developer with deep Laravel expertise and experience designing
scalable, high-volume applications - this is your opportunity to make a real impact.
Required Skills & Experience

e 4+ years of solid PHP Backend Development experience

e Strong expertise in Laravel Framework

e Experience with MySQL Database Design & Optimization

e Strong knowledge of REST API Development & Integration

e Experience with AWS Cloud Services

e Strong understanding of Software Architecture & Scalable Systems

Nice to Have

e Develop and maintain backend systems using PHP (Laravel MVC Framework)

e Design scalable, secure, and high-performance backend architectures

e Build and integrate RESTful APIs & third-party API services

e Follow best practices in OOP, MVC architecture, clean code & deployment

e Contribute to system design, performance optimization, and code reviews
Why we think you’ll like working at Titan FX
We actively foster a culture that supports our core values to Deliver, Empower and Care. Our
culture sets us apart - it’s a key reason that brings people to Titan FX and keeps them here.
In addition to receiving a competitive industry salary with the potential to earn a bonus each
year, we also offer;

e training workshops, coaching and career development programs

e flexible working conditions to support our people to find the right balance

e travel opportunities to our HQ in Vanuatu and other satellite offices
We take our core values seriously and work hard to create an environment where everyone
feels welcome. Teams who reflect a diversity of experience, identity, perspective and
background, help us to create a healthy & inclusive working culture.

Typical Day in Role:

maintained and executed test plans to rigorously test product functionality and investigate all
potential product test failures
Write API automation using Postman
Writing and maintaining technical program, end user documentation and operational procedures
* Researching, consulting, analysing and evaluating system program needs

‘* Page object model
© Agile experience

* Your strength is your ability to recognize what's wrong, troubleshoot and provide solutions that
would enforce bug-free implementation.
* You're a self-starter with a strong desire to work on a small collaborative team in a fast-paced
environment.
Important background information and Questions to submit when applying
* Weare in Ontario, Canada, and the time difference is 9.5 or 10.5 hours during the year. To
ensure that there is sufficient contact time between you and the developers, you will have to be
available for meetings between 6.30 and 9.30 PM your time. You may be required to be
available at other hours during emergencies. You can choose to do the other at hours of your
choice but online between these hours. Are you able to do this on a consistent basis?

* We have mobile and tablet applications for both Android and Apple (i0S) platforms. To support
this, we require the necessary devices & tools, like iOS and Android devices.

* This is a fulltime permanent position, and we are looking for a long-term commitment by mutual
agreement. What period can you commit to in term of number of years provided we are happy
with each other?

* What are your salary expectations?

*  Ifyouare offered a job, when is the earliest you can start?

Compensation will be paid in Canadian dollars.

If you qualify, please send us your resume with your salary expectations in SLR to
resume@paymatesoftware.com. Please send a cover letter to explain your availably and indicate if you
have worked on similar projects.
